summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RAG Chatbot Analytics Dashboard. All backend APIs (17 tests) and frontend UI tests passed successfully. Remote Qdrant (148.230.92.74:6333) and Ollama (31.220.21.156:11434) connections verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created test sessions via API during testing (TEST_session_for_testing, TEST_detail_session, TEST_delete_session)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All analytics endpoints working. Dashboard has two tabs (Usage Metrics, RAG Performance) with proper data visualization. Remote services (Qdrant, Ollama) are connected. LLM has cold-start latency of 30-60 seconds as expected.

backend_apis: GET /api/status/ - Service status showing Ollama, Qdrant, PostgreSQL connected
GET /api/analytics/usage/ - Returns summary, messages_over_time, sessions_over_time, feedback_distribution
GET /api/analytics/rag/ - Returns summary, latency_over_time, score_distribution, latency_distribution
frontend_features: Dashboard link in main chat header (BarChart3 icon)
Usage Metrics tab with stat cards and charts
RAG Performance tab with latency and score visualizations
